posts.text:
We need to stay ahead of the threats from China-linked companies that could put Americans’ financial data at risk.

That includes families and businesses in South Carolina.

This effort builds on @SECGov’s important work to protect investors and keep our markets strong.


U.S. Senate Banking Committee GOP (@BankingGOP)

Chairman @SenatorTimScott and Ranking Member @SenWarren are building on @SECGov’s Cross-Border Task Force to address risks from China-linked firms, strengthen transparency, and p
Brackets are set. Let the madness begin! #MarchMadness #goSCteams
Democrats have continued to block 120,000 DHS employees from getting paid. The men and women who keep our homeland safe should not bear the brunt of political theater.

The Working Families Tax Cut delivered a historic expansion of school choice, giving parents a choice and kids a real chance.

Video

When schools fall short, parents should have options.

The Kids in Classes Act empowers families and puts students first.

Video

Through my work as Chairman of @BankingGOP, we're working hard in Washington to make sure folks back home in South Carolina and across America can use digital assets to build wealth and access new financial opportunities.

Video

When DHS isn’t funded, TSA workers go without pay, airport lines grow longer, and America’s security is put at risk.

Democrats need to act now and fund DHS!

Video

It's time for Democrats to do their jobs and protect the American people by passing DHS funding.

Video

Election integrity is the cornerstone of our democracy.

The SAVE America Act makes it easier to vote and harder to cheat.

Video

Happy National Agriculture Week!

This week, we celebrate South Carolina’s farmers and the industry that helps power our state and feed our nation. Grateful for the hardworking men and women who keep America growing!

Democrats need to listen to the American people.

Support voter ID. Pass the SAVE America Act. It's common sense.

Video

It was great to meet with the United States @SenateYouth Program’s South Carolina delegates in Washington!

This program brings student leaders from across the country to our nation’s capital to learn about public service and see the federal government in action.

Proud to see these young leaders representing the Palmetto State!

The SAVE America Act reflects what Americans already believe.

71% of voters support the SAVE America Act - including 50% of Democrats and 69% of Independents. Protecting our elections is just common sense.

Always great spending time with University of South Carolina women’s basketball coach, Dawn Staley. She shared some wisdom that applies beyond the court: “Do what you don’t want to do to get what you want.”

That’s the mindset that builds champions!

A huge congratulations to Quinn Lawton from Estill, South Carolina for being named the National Young Marine of the Year!

During my recent meeting with Quinn, it was clear he represents the values of the @USYoungMarines program: discipline, leadership, and service.

South Carolina is proud of his accomplishment!

🚨⚠️South Carolinians: a strong storm system is moving across the Carolinas today and has triggered multiple severe weather alerts across the state, especially in the Upstate, Midlands, and coastal areas. 
Stay safe: follow local guidance, avoid driving during severe conditions, and enable weather alerts.🚨⚠️

Dr. Hope Rivers is breaking barriers as a first-generation college student and the first Black and female president of @piedmont_tech. From Whitmire, SC, Dr. Rivers represents the largest area in the SC Technical College System.

Under her leadership, the Fall 2025 semester saw the highest course success rate in the college’s history. #WomensHistoryMonth

Standing in Charleston, where Robert Smalls sailed himself from slavery to freedom, reminded all of us that the promise of America is not just a place, it is an idea, a story, and a people. The @FaithandPolitic Pilgrimage brought Members of Congress and our communities together across every difference to wrestle honestly with that story, and to recommit ourselves to the more perfect union it demands of us.
